title: Fence disputes: law vs Brenda energy
body: Fence rules are usually a mix of local ordinance, recorded easements, and (if any) HOA CC&Rs — not your neighbor's preferred aesthetic. Common patterns: setbacks, height limits, and who pays for a boundary fence vary by state and city. Ask your county/city for fence height and setback rules, check your survey for the property line, and read any HOA docs. This is educational pattern language — not legal advice for your lot.
